title: Oscars organization expands international film eligibility, addresses AI in new rules
description: The organization behind the Oscars is for the first time addressing the use of artificial intelligence in performances and scripts for the 2027 Academy Awards. The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences on Friday released updates across many categories, stressing the importance of human authorship while not banning AI.…

title: Dueling PACs with similar names, one with AI ties, pouring money into Ohio congressional race
description: Jobs and Democracy PAC, funded by artificial intelligence industry figures, is backing Brook Park Democrat Brian Poindexter in Tuesday's 7th District congressional primary.
content: CLEVELAND — Two political action committees with confusingly similar names are pouring more than $500,000 into Ohio’s 7th Congressional District Democratic primary — one backing Republican U.S. Rep. Max Miller, the other boosting a Democrat who hopes... [8312 chars]

title: AI actors and writers not eligible for Oscars - Academy
description: LOS ANGELES — Actors created with artificial intelligence will not be eligible for an Oscar, the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences said Friday as it launched a crackdown on the use of AI.
content:
LOS ANGELES — Actors created with artificial intelligence will not be eligible for an Oscar, the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences said Friday as it launched a crackdown on the use of AI.

title: US signs deals with 7 tech companies to use AI in classified military systems
description: WASHINGTON — The Pentagon said Friday that it has reached deals with seven tech companies to use their artificial intelligence in its classified computer networks, allowing the military to tap into AI-powered capabilities to help it fight wars.
content:

title: Organization reviews rules, film eligibility
description: The organization behind the Oscars is for the first time addressing the eligibility of films that use artificial intelligence in new rules for the 2027 Academy Awards. The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences on Friday released updates across many categories, stressing the importance of human authorship while not banning AI.

title: BMO Turns to AI and Quantum Computing to Predict Earthquakes
description: Bank of Montreal is betting on artificial intelligence and quantum computing to help predict earthquakes and respond to wildfires as part of the Canadian bank’s expansion in the US.
content:

title: Pentagon reaches deals with eight AI companies
description: The Pentagon announced Friday that it has reached deals with eight artificial intelligence companies to deploy their software department-wide.
content:

title: A leading journal finds that AI is flooding academic publishing with lower quality work
description: Artificial intelligence can undoubtedly help scientists with their academic papers by summarizing research and helping to improve writing. However, one downside is that it has led to a wave of poorly written submissions and reviews, according to a new study published in Organization Science.
